summary: Meteorologists have forecast the first official heatwave of the summer this week with temperatures expected to exceed 40C in some areas.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday
summary: Brown bear spotted sprinting down highway in Navarre, Spain triples funds to investigate diseases affecting women, three accused of robbing foreigners' homes in Alicante and more news from Spain this Tuesday June 16th.

title: Toothless Spain held by Cape Verde on World Cup debut
summary: Spain's ghosts of recent World Cup horror shows reappeared in Atlanta as the European champions were held 0-0 by debutants Cape Verde in their opening game on Monday.

title: Spanish footballer Mir sentenced to 8.5 years in prison for sexual assault
summary: Sevilla striker Rafa Mir has been sentenced to eight-and-a-half years in prison after being convicted of sexual assault and bodily harm, the Valencian community High Court of Justice said Monday.
